center.name: 非洲東部高地
center.summary: 非洲東部高地是東非的山脈，位於津巴布韋東部，最高點是海拔高度2,592米的伊尼揚加尼山，該地區人迹罕至，是多種壁虎、蜥蜴、青蛙和蛇類的棲息地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to South Africa, Eswatini, the Matobos and Eastern Highlands of Zimbabwe and adjacent Mozambique

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is, however, also commonly found in miombo and mopane woodland, and is one of the commonest bird species on the Mozambican coastal plain. It is also present in the Eastern Highlands and the East African uplands below 2,000 m.{{cite book |last=Zimmerman |first=Dale A
